title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
